Books.body: 1. “Sanatan Sanskriti ki Atal Drishti” by Vasudev Devanani
2. “I Am Georgia” by Italy’s Prime Minister
3. “The Loneliness of Sonia and Sunny” by Kiran Desai.
4. “Brahmastra Unlisted” by retired IPS officer D. Shivandan.
5. “Ready Relevant and Resurgent Second” by CDS General Anil Chauhan.
6. "A Billion Butterflies: A Life in Climate and Chaos Theory" By Jagadish Shukla
7. “Great Consigliatore: A Book on Lal Bahadur Shastri” by Sanjeev Chopra.
8. “Mother Mary Comes to Me” by Arundhati Roy.
9. “Operation Sindoor: Untold Story of India’s Deep Strike inside Pakistan” by KGS Dilan.
10. “Bhupen Hazarika” by Anuradha Sharma.
11. “Why The Constitution Matters” by Justice Chandrachud.
12. M.S Swaminathan’s Biography : "The Man Who Fed India" By Priyambada Jayakumar
13. “Ramanujan: Journey of a Great Mathematician” by Arun Singhal and Devendra Kumar Sharma.
14. “The Burning Earth” by Sunil Amrit.
15. “The Conscience Network” by Sugata Srinivasa Raju.
16. “The One: Cricket My Life and More” by Shikhar Dhawan.
17. “Life and Mass: Collected Stories” by Namita Gokhale
18. “The World After Gaza” by Pankaj Mishra.
19. “The New Icon: Savarkar and the Facts” by Arun Shori.
20. 'Karuna: The Power of Compassion' by Kailash Satyarthi
Chaman Arora with Sahitya Akademi Award 2024 for his 'Ik Hor Ashwthama’ in Dogri language.
I Am a Soldier’s Wife: The Life and Love of Toni Lidder “ authored by Geetika Lidder
“The New Icon: Savarkar and the Facts” by Arun Shourie
Namita Gokhale released ‘Life on Mars: Collected Stories’
“Leo — The Untold Story” by P.S. Raman about CSK
Nobel Peace Prize laureate and social reformer Kailash Satyarthi launched his autobiography ‘Diyasalaai’
Poetry collection ‘Buransh: The Fragrance of Words’, authored by Anupama Sharma
"The Undying Light: A Personal History of Independent India" authored by former Governor of West Bengal (WB), Gopalkrishna Gandhi
“The Tamils: A Portrait of Community”, written by Nirmala Lakshman
The Diary of a Cricketer’s Wife: A Very Unusual Memoir By Puja Pujara and Namita Kala
History That India Ignored by Prem Prakash
“Why the Constitution Matters” by Former CJI D.Y. Chandrachud
“Secession of the Successful: The Flight Out of New India” by Sanjay Baru
"Believer’s Dilemma" Atal Bihari Vajpayee's biography written by Abhishek Choudhary
(I am a Cancer Survivor / “Maine Cancer Ko Jeet Liye”) by Dr. Palakonda Vijay Anand Reddy
Poem "Main toh Yahan Hoon" By Ramdarash Mishra
'The Last Day' by Jaroslavas Melnikas (Translation - Antim Din by Dr. Poonam Tiwari)
